title: 10 best herbal teas for benign prostatic hypertrophy
intro_desc: Herbal teas for benign prostatic hypertrophy are natural remedies that help alleviate the symptoms of an enlarged prostate, a common condition in aging men. These teas work by reducing inflammation, improving urinary flow, and relieving symptoms such as frequent urination and nocturia. The best herbal teas for benign prostatic hypertrophy include Serenoa repens, Urtica dioica, Curcuma longa, Cucurbita pepo, Prunus africana, Pygeum africanum, Ginkgo biloba, Epilobium parviflorum, Lycopodium clavatum, and Zingiber officinale. If left untreated, benign prostatic hypertrophy can lead to urinary tract infections, kidney damage, and a reduced quality of life, affecting daily activities and overall well-being.
